refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
callable
The callback invoked for each chart. Returning &false; halts iteration.
sheet
The name of the worksheet to iterate. When omitted or &null;, the worksheet currently open for reading is used, falling back to the first worksheet.
&reftitle.returnvalues; Returns &true; on success, or &false; when no workbook is open for reading or the requested worksheet cannot be opened.
